title: Vanguard
tagline: Trustworthy plainspoken voice, but the home is a hero rotator + redundant CTA strips. Variants restore single-message hero and a goals-first IA.

direction.phrase: Redesign this home page for presales (brand-faithful Mode A; three variants A/B/C).

fontDeck.name: brand-inherited
fontDeck.value: FF Mark (canonical); Mona Sans / Inter Tight as license-free stand-in

originalCritique: The voice is genuinely good — plainspoken, warm-imperative, trusted. The composition undermines it: a hero rotator dilutes any single message, photo-radii (0px) sit inside card-radii (32px) so the photo always looks pasted-in, and the home repeats the same CTA-strip three times. Type scale is ad-hoc at ~1.22. The page contradicts the voice — it tells you to stay calm by shouting four offers at once.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA. Single-message hero replaces the rotator. Photo-radius aligns to card-radius. Modular 1.25 ladder. Redundant CTA strips collapse to one.
variants.fix: Same IA. Single-message hero replaces the rotator — one promise, one image, one CTA. Photo-radius aligns to card-radius (24px in 32px). Modular 1.25 ladder. Redundant CTA strips collapse to one anchored utility shelf. The voice and the composition finally agree.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: Same palette, same type. Goals-first IA (Retire · Save for college · Build wealth · Manage day-to-day) replaces audience-first navigation. Coaching-warm voice gets a structure that matches it.
variants.fix: Same palette, same type. Goals-first IA (Retire · Save for college · Build wealth · Manage day-to-day) replaces audience-first navigation. The coaching-warm voice gets a structure that matches it — "what are you trying to do?" before "who are you?". Audience entry-points recede to secondary nav.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: Push one element: a blush-band motif as a primary section ground (additive token --blush-deep #FFD7D7, derived from the captured palette). Type pushed to the next 1.25 step on the hero.
variants.fix: Push one element. A blush-band motif becomes a primary section ground — additive token --blush-deep #FFD7D7, derived not invented, same hue family as captured. Hero type pushed to the next 1.25 step. The brand's quietly-warm voice finally has a colour that warms with it.
